changelog: New command `gitmap github-desktop` (alias `gd`) registers the current working-directory git repo with GitHub Desktop in one shot. No prior `gitmap scan` required — the long-standing `desktop-sync` (`ds`) needed the last-scan output JSON, which is why running `gd` from a freshly cloned repo used to print 'Unknown command'. The new command verifies cwd contains a `.git` entry, then invokes the GitHub Desktop CLI directly.
Optional path argument: `gitmap gd D:\path\to\other\repo` registers any folder, not just cwd.
Wired through `dispatchTooling`, listed in `gitmap help` (Cloning section) and the compact view, full `helptext/github-desktop.md` page, completion list updated, parity tests updated.
